title: 151 Spray Paint, Grey Primer, 400Ml
features: MULTI SURFACE PRIMER: 151 Grey Primer Spray Paint, use on a wide range of surfaces. Formulation offers good coverage and is fast drying
PROFESSIONAL FINISH: 151 Spray Paint, restore, rejuvenate and transform many items. Always ensure the surface to be painted is properly prepared to achieve a professional finish
INDOOR & OUTDOOR USE: 151 Spray Paint, straightforward spray making indoor or outdoor DIY projects effortless

EASY TO USE: Always ensure surfaces are clean, free from dirt and dust. Follow all directions on the can to achieve the best results. Always store in a cool dry place, keep away from direct heat sources. Keep away from children.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 400ml Grey Primer Spray Paint
description: 151 Spray Paint, leaves a fantastic finish on most surfaces including metal, wood and bricks. Restore, rejuvenate and transform many items. Straightforward spray making indoor or outdoor DIY projects effortless. Always ensure the surface to be painted is properly prepared to achieve a professional finish. Ready to use 400ml Grey Primer Spray Paint
